title: SP Client Metadata
description: Service Provider client metadata following RFC 7591, published at /.well-known/oauth-client-metadata.

client_id.description: Client identifier. Typically the SP's domain name.

client_name.description: Human-readable display name of the SP.

redirect_uris.description: Array of allowed redirect URIs for OAuth callbacks.

client_uri.description: URL to the SP's homepage or description page.

logo_uri.description: URL to the SP's logo image.

policy_uri.description: URL to the SP's privacy policy.

tos_uri.description: URL to the SP's terms of service.

ddisa_domain.description: The SP's primary domain (for DDISA DNS verification).
